title: Evangelium Modpack
description: The official Modpack for the first iteration of the YT-Project called "Evangelium" including the aether-like Evangelium-Mod
body:
### ❓ General Info
This is the official release of the Modpack for the Evangelium-Project featuring 32 small german YouTubers. The main focus og this modpack lies upon the Evangelium-Mod, which is implementing a new "aether-like" Dimension to the game in a vanilla-friendly way.

# What does it add?
## 😈/😇Dimensions
This modpack enhances the Nether-Dimension and adds a completely new Dimension called "Elysium". The Elysium is inspired by the famous "Aether-Dimension" and acts as a counterpart to the Nether.
The Elysium is from the [**Evangelium-Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/evangelium), which I have created myself.
The Nether gets it's uplift by the [**Cinderscapes-Mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes) from Terraformers.

## ➕ Vanilla Friendly Additions
To spice up the experience of the modern Minecraft-Versions, some additional Vanilla+ Mods, that would perfectly fit in the Vanilla-Game, were added, such as:
- [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify)
- [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
- [Flowery Mooblooms](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-flowery-mooblooms-fabric)

## 💻 Performance & QoL
Because this modpack also serves for my own Server-Project, many performance mods have been thrown into the mix.
Furthermore I'm an old school OptiFine Player so I added mods that replicate OptiFine's most memorable features (Zoom and Capes).

## 🌲 World Generation
To not outshine the Overworld by the new Elysium, and the updated Nether, I also added [William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo) into the list.
